message:
Running command: 
# 202 min CPU / ~54 min elapsed. Groups phase still running.
# Setting up a background loop that checks every hour and writes to a log
cat > /tmp/monitor_full.sh << 'MONEOF'
#!/bin/bash
RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"
STEP70_LOG="$RUN_DIR/70-openroad-detailedrouting/openroad-detailedrouting.log"
MON_LOG="/tmp/drt_hourly.log"

while true; do
    TS=$(date)
    ORPID=$(ps aux | grep openroad | grep -v grep | awk '{print $2}' | head -1)
    LOG_SIZE=$(stat -c%s "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    LOG_MOD=$(stat -c%y "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo "unknown")
    LOG_LINES=$(wc -l < "$STEP70_LOG" 2>/dev/null || echo "0")
    VMRSS=$(cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep VmRSS | awk '{print $2}')
    STATE=$(cat /proc/${ORPID}/status 2>/dev/null | grep "^State:" | awk '{print $2}')
    CPU_TIME=$(ps -p ${ORPID} -o cputime= 2>/dev/null)
    FINAL=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/final/" 2>/dev/null && echo "FINAL_EXISTS" || echo "no_final")
    
    echo "[$TS] PID:$ORPID State:$STATE RSS:${VMRSS}kB CPUtime:$CPU_TIME LogLines:$LOG_LINES LogMod:$LOG_MOD Final:$FINAL" >> "$MON_LOG"
    
    # If final exists, stop monitoring
    [ "$FINAL" = "FINAL_EXISTS" ] && echo "[$TS] FINAL DIRECTORY APPEARED! Flow complete." >> "$MON_LOG" && break
    
    # If process died, stop
    [ -z "$ORPID" ] && echo "[$TS] OpenROAD process DIED" >> "$MON_LOG" && break
    
    sleep 3600
done
MONEOF
chmod +x /tmp/monitor_full.sh
# Kill old monitor if running
kill $(pgrep -f monitor_drt) 2>/dev/null || true
kill $(pgrep -f monitor_full) 2>/dev/null || true
# Start new one
nohup /tmp/monitor_full.sh &
echo "Hourly monitor started: PID $!, log at /tmp/drt_hourly.log"

function.name: execute_bash
